title: bromelia ananas var. viridis
intro: Bromelia ananas var. viridis, also known as the green pineapple, is a variety of the pineapple plant that is characterized by its green, unripe fruit and leaves. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Bromelia ananas var. viridis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
